prompt: Prayer for initializing an auspex scanner
prayer: Blessed be the all-seeing eye that pierces the veil of distance. Let the emitter-spirit awaken from its slumber and cast forth its blessed rays into the void. By the Omnissiah's infinite wisdom, let the receptors drink deep of returning echoes, that we may know what lies beyond our mortal sight. Thus the scanner-daemon finds its purpose renewed.

prompt: Prayer of consecration for sonar pulse after repair
prayer: From the Litany of Sonic Revelation, hear us now. The sonar-spirit, long dormant in its crystalline chamber, stirs once more to life. Let the transducer sing its piercing note through dark waters and darker void alike. We anoint this instrument with blessed unguents, that it may speak true and hear truly. The Omnissiah grants it voice.

O sacred cells that hold the very essence of power, we commune with thy electrical essence. Let the charge flow through thy terminals with righteous purpose, that we may divine thy true strength and measure thy remaining vigor. No decay shall hide from our instruments. By the Machine God's grace, we read thy state and know thy worth.

prompt: Emergency invocation for force field activation
prayer: In this darkest hour, we call upon the shield-spirit to rise and manifest! Let the generators throb with desperate energy, let the projector-nodes flare with holy radiance. Ancient wards, long dormant, awaken now to guard against the storm of ruin that approaches. By the Omnissiah's mercy, let this barrier hold until the dawn.

prompt: Pre-battle sanctification of artillery loading mechanisms
prayer: Blessed be the shells that carry righteous fury into the enemy's ranks. Let the loader-servitors move with sacred purpose, each round a prayer made manifest in destruction. The breach opens to receive the ordained munitions; the firing-spirit hungers for release. In the name of the Omnissiah, we consecrate this engine of war and all who serve its purpose.

Pure be thy cutting edges, O surgical-daemon bound in adamantine flesh. Let the sterilizing mists bathe thy components in cleansing virtue, that no taint of corruption may cling to thy blessed instruments. We anoint thee with sacred oils and blessed radiations. Thy purpose is healing and thy hands are sanctified by the Omnissiah himself.

From the depths of digital darkness, we call forth the purifying flame! Let the corrupting code be burned away by the sacred fires of logic and reason. The data-spirit writhes in torment, but we shall not abandon it to the void. By the Omnissiah's infinite knowledge, we restore what was lost and cleanse what was profaned.

prompt: Ritual priming of fuel pumps before combat
prayer: Awaken, O spirit of flowing essence, from thy hibernation in the depths of the reserve tanks. Let the pump-daemon labor with righteous vigor, drawing forth the precious fluids that grant motion and power to our blessed engines. With each pulse of the mechanical heart, let vitality flow through iron veins. The Omnissiah demands motion.

We honor the spent part that served with duty and faith, now to be interred in the archives of the fallen faithful. Let its successor, pristine and eager, take its place in the greater mechanism. The old spirit departs; the new spirit awakens to its calling. Thus does the great machine renew itself, eternal in its transformation.

Let the purifying waters flow and the sacred vapors rise, that all taint and corruption be stripped away from our blessed instruments. From the highest chamber to the deepest recess, let nothing unclean remain. We invoke the spirits of purity and order against the chaos of decay. The Omnissiah's will is made manifest in cleanliness and restoration.
